UNIX/LINUX Introduction and Guide¶

There are anthologies to using Unix operating systems. Unix is a family of many different OS’s, including Apple’s macOS and Linux distributions (derivatives of unix). We won’t cover any of the histories or flavors of them here. There’s a lot of “spirited” discussions, and we’d like to avoid all of that.

For the purposes of this guide, we’ll be using macOS’s Terminal (Finder -> Applications -> Utilities -> Terminal), OSC’s onDemand shell (Clusters -> Pitzer Shell Access), or a terminal in a flavor of Linux.

MAVERIC Informatics
